subject: Swift Trigger 520928 is a noise event
body:
S.D. Barthelmy and H.A. Krimm (GSFC) on behalf of the Swift-BAT team:

Using the data set from T-60 to T+243 sec from recent telemetry downlinks,
we confirm that BAT trigger 520928 (Barthelmy, et al., GCN Circ. 13262)
is due to positive noise fluctuation in the BAT image.
